abilities.name: battle-armor
abilities.effect: Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon. This ability functions identically to Shell Armor.
abilities.flavorText: Hard armor protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

abilities.name: tough-claws
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33× their power.
abilities.effect: Strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33× their power.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

abilities.name: steely-spirit
abilities.shortEffect: Powers up ally Pokémon's Steel-type moves.
abilities.effect: Powers up the Steel-type moves of the Pokémon and its allies.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up the Steel-type moves of the Pokémon and its allies.
